prose:
The frontier orbitals calculation on water was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory within the chemkit framework, specifically using PySCF. The calculation used the specified molecule file and set the charge to 0 and multiplicity to 1, in the gas phase (no solvent). Results:
- HOMO energy: -8.6037183 eV
- LUMO energy: 0.33695037 eV
- HOMO-LUMO gap: 8.9406687 eV
The SCF procedure converged in 7 cycles, and the orbitals were successfully obtained. The calculation was carried out with the "standard" tier and the method provenance is clearly documented. Provenance:
- Property: frontier orbitals (HOMO/LUMO energies)
- Level of theory: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier "standard")
- Geometry source: input xyz file at the specified path
- Environment: gas phase
- Charge: 0, Multiplicity: 1
- Software: PySCF
- SCF converged properly
Warnings:
- energy_finite: total/electronic energy is finite.
- scf_converged: SCF converged after 7 cycles.
- Schema header and headline fields are present and verified.
